creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #11)

Do you mean the following commit to main:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/src/commit/?id=9ee759f3676f700f8224a95216f659f87f5d9ae9

commit 9ee759f3676f700f8224a95216f659f87f5d9ae9
Author:     Michal Meloun <mmel@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2025-05-01 08:54:05 +0000
Commit:     Michal Meloun <mmel@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2025-05-04 11:48:04 +0000

    Decorate IPv4 structures used for byte buffer overlays as packed.
. . .


from earlier this month (well before yesterday)?

It may take a a while to get an armv7 context set up.

I assume you are okay with testing based on a PkgBase
base_latest install (kernel and world) that was from
well after the above.

Since it is more than 1.75 yrs later, I'm not about
replicating various details of how I was testing
such back then. I may have to explore before
concluding much.
